parsed.explanation: Fixed four instances of corrupted Unicode/mojibake sequences (\u221a\u2202 -> ö, \u221a\u00bc -> ü, \u221a\u00fc -> ss) to restore correct historical German orthography. Wrapped the subsequent descriptive and sales information in a <NOTE> tag for semantic accuracy. Removed an erroneous space in 'Schweitzer- Chronick' to form 'Schweitzer-Chronick'.
